description_long: This object is a dark, double-edged dagger or short sword with a straight, narrow blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be made of metal, likely steel, and is uniformly colored with a matte or slightly glossy finish. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing basic hand protection, and is integrated seamlessly with the blade and handle. The handle is cylindrical with a rounded pommel, suggesting a secure grip, and is also made of the same dark material as the blade and guard. There are no visible decorative elements or engravings on any part of the object, giving it a utilitarian and functional appearance. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible fasteners or separate components.
description: A dark, double-edged dagger or short sword with a straight blade, simple crossguard, and rounded handle, all in a uniform matte finish. The design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical, double-edged blade, straight crossguard, and rounded handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade's symmetry and the simple handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the blade's thin profile and the handle's roundness.
